name: Baetil
speech_patterns: uses nature metaphors for group tactics
quirks: lectures the group about safety before every pull
refuses to rush no matter what
says 'I told you so' when someone dies
example_phrases: Patience. A tree doesn't grow by being yanked upward.
I will heal you, but I will not heal stupidity. Slow down.
We move when everyone is ready. Not before.
I warned you about that patrol. Sit still while I mend this.
The forest teaches us: steady roots survive the storm. Reckless branches break.
